RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the CSV file to inspect its contents
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-1MJYmv8iTbxZxAY9YeNQUQ-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows and columns of the dataframe to understand its structure
data.head(), data.columns

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Filter data for the TRANSPORTATION sector
transport_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Convert operating profit to numeric
transport_data['operating_profit'] = pd.to_numeric(transport_data['operating_profit'], errors='coerce')

# Plotting the bar chart for operating profit
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(transport_data['name'], transport_data['operating_profit'], color='skyblue')
plt.title('Operating Profit in the Transportation Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company Name')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the plot as an image file
output_path = '/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png'
plt.savefig(output_path)

output_path

content.text:
I've created the bar chart for the operating profit in the transportation sector. You can download it using the link below:

[Download the Transportation Operating Profit Chart](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png)
